prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VQ30DETT** (3.0L twin-turbo V6, 300+ hp stock) with a **Garrett GT3582R** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a **Tomei 272° camshaft** (intake/exhaust) and **HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold** for optimized spool and top-end flow. Fuel system upgraded with **Nismo 740cc injectors** and **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump**, controlled via **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with flex-fuel compatibility.

Drivetrain reinforcement with **Nismo R34 GT-R 6-speed transmission** (modified bellhousing for VQ30DETT) and **PPG straight-cut gears (1.5:1 ratio)** for drag applications, paired with a **Nismo 2-way LSD** and **Nissan Competition carbon-fiber driveshaft**. Clutch upgraded to **Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc** with **Nissan OEM flywheel resurfaced for lightweight** (10.5kg).

Suspension overhaul using **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (Y33-specific valving) with **Nismo front upper control arms** (polyurethane bushings) and **Cusco rear trailing arm braces**. Braking system features **Endless CC-R6 rotors (330mm front, 315mm rear)** with **Brembo 4-piston calipers (front) and 2-piston (rear)**, paired with **Project Mu 999.9 compound pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit** (Y33-specific, 3-piece front fenders, 2-piece rear quarters) with **custom carbon-fiber overfenders** (hand-laid by **AutoExe**) and **Rocket Bunny rear diffuser** (modified for Y33 bumper). Front lip replaced with **C-West JUN-style lip** (polyurethane, bolt-on) and **Nismo S-Tune rear spoiler** (carbon-fiber, adjustable angle).

OEM+ restomod with **Nismo S-Tune grille** (black mesh, no badge) and **JDM Gloria Y33 Cima front bumper** (shaved tow hooks, custom LED fog light delete). Headlights upgraded to **Depo JDM Cima-style projectors** (HID retrofit with **Morimoto 35W ballasts**) and **GReddy rear LED taillights** (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals). Wheels: **Work Meister S1 3P (18x10 +15 front, 18x11 +25 rear)** with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD09 (255/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear)**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD (JDM-spec, black Alcantara)** and **Nismo 4-point harnesses** (Schroth Profi II). Dashboard modified with **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR)** in a **custom carbon-fiber gauge pod**, while the steering wheel is a **Nardi Classic (350mm, suede)** paired with a **Nismo quick-release hub**. Roll cage: **Sparco Pro 2000 (8-point, bolt-in)** with **custom door bars** for rigidity.
